mbackup module¶

This module handles the cli interface for mbackup and is the entrypoint for the mbackup application.

Use mbackup –help to get help message.

mbackup.createLogger(logFile, debug=False)¶
mbackup.getVersion()¶
mbackup.logDebugList(list)¶
mbackup.main()¶
mbackup.parsArguments()¶
mbackup.readBackupList(listFile)¶

Read list of locations to backup

Parameters:listFile (fileHandler) – File containing locations to backup
Returns:a multidimensional list.
Return type:list
Raises:an error when their is an unkown backup type. –
